Package nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.actions.scaledger

Class LoadXlsmTableActionFX

java.lang.Object
nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.actions.scaledger.LoadXlsmTableActionFX
All Implemented Interfaces:
EventListener, javafx.event.EventHandler<javafx.event.ActionEvent>
public class LoadXlsmTableActionFX extends Object implements javafx.event.EventHandler<javafx.event.ActionEvent>
JavaFX action handler for loading data from an Excel XLSM file. This action prompts the user to select an .xlsm file using a FileChooser. Upon selection, it reads the first sheet of the workbook into a Swing DefaultTableModel (via XlsmTableViewerFX.readXlsmToTableModel(File, int)), then converts this model into a JavaFX TableView which is displayed in a new window.

The selected file's path is stored via the associated SCALedgerPlugin, preferences are updated, and data is loaded using SCALedgerDataLoader into the plugin's bean map (typically using "jxlsMapping.xml").

  • Constructor Details

    • LoadXlsmTableActionFX

      public LoadXlsmTableActionFX(javafx.stage.Stage owner, SCALedgerPlugin plugin)
      Constructs a new LoadXlsmTableActionFX.
      Parameters:
      owner - The owner Stage for any dialogs or new windows created by this action. Must not be null.
      plugin - The SCALedgerPlugin instance that will manage the state of the loaded XLSM file and its processed data. Must not be null.
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if owner or plugin is null (though not explicitly checked here, they are later used and would cause NPE if null).

  • Method Details

    • handle

      public void handle(javafx.event.ActionEvent e)

      Handles the action event, typically from a menu item, to load and display an XLSM file's first sheet. The process includes:

      1. Presenting a FileChooser to the user to select an ".xlsm" file. The initial directory is based on preferences.
      2. If a file is selected:
        • The first sheet of the XLSM file is read into a Swing DefaultTableModel.
        • This Swing model is converted to a JavaFX TableView<Map<String, Object>>.
        • The selected file is set as the current SCA file in the associated SCALedgerPlugin.
        • The last directory preference is updated.
        • Data is loaded from the XLSM file into the plugin's beans using SCALedgerDataLoader (with a hardcoded "jxlsMapping.xml" file).
        • The JavaFX TableView is displayed in a new Stage.
      3. If file selection is cancelled, or if any Exception occurs during processing (e.g., file reading, data loading), an error alert is shown and the stack trace is printed.

      Specified by:
      handle in interface javafx.event.EventHandler<javafx.event.ActionEvent>
      Parameters:
      e - The ActionEvent that triggered this handler.
